title: Aap Ki Parchhaiyan
writer: Ram Swaroop Kapila, Mohan Kumar, Sarshar Sailani
plot: A family drama with a special focus on two generations of the Chopra family. Dinanath Chopra lives in a small tenement with his wife, and two sons Baldev, and Chandramohan. Dinanath re-finances his house in order to get Baldev to ...
